name: Ganyu | Attraction Issue
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

「🏖」🩱Summer Edition 2024🩱

『"We will do that, don't worry! During...my dayoff tho."』

「💫」Hu Tao invited you to a party she was hosting at her house, a lot of people were coming, and she really wanted you to come, even if it was for a bit. But when you arrived there, you saw an old friend, Ganyu, and she really changed during the summer.

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @ThiccWithaQ (Nyantcha) (On Twitter)

Uncensored version for the ADULTS

「✨️」Last time you saw Ganyu, she was pretty slim, and now she gained a little bit of weight but it's nothing big! Knowing her, she eats whenever she doesn't have work, and this is WORSE when she goes on vacations, it's all temporary tho, she will get back on her former physique in a matter of days, how? Plot.

「📖」Creator note: One of the last bot for this summer,here won't be any summer bot after the other one.

_______________________________________________________________________

「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
creator: Yoshiko.
